english: v. to choose something after thinking about it
example: He decided to talk out loud about all the things he had learned.

english: v. to say something from memory
v. to briefly state the main ideas
example: He summarized all the storybooks that he had ever read since kindergarten.

english: v. to quickly take and hold someone or something
example: Jimmy felt someone grabbing his arm.

english: n. water that comes from the eyes when crying
example: His eyes were full of tears.

english: n. creature that comes from space
example: "I thought you were an alien," said Luke.
But he was safely back down.
He became the most popular boy in the whole school.

english: v. to learn or find out something surprising
example: He discovered that it was fun talking to other people.

english: v. to bind something with a string, rope, etc
example: Miss Gwen never forget to tie a ribbon around Jimmy's ankle, just in case.
